name: twenty
description: Create, operate, develop, publish, and query Twenty apps through Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Create, develop, publish, and query apps
interface.longDescription: Use Twenty to scaffold apps, manage and troubleshoot app remotes, sync, builds, deploys, logs, and CI/CD, add app entities such as objects, fields, logic functions, views, layouts, skills, agents, and front components, search official Twenty documentation through the bundled docs MCP server, configure workspace-specific Twenty MCP servers with OAuth, retrieve workspace data as readable Markdown, and prepare README, marketplace metadata, logos, and screenshots for Twenty apps.
defaultPrompt: Create and run a new Twenty app
Push a Twenty app to production
